proposal.working_title: AI Labs Explained: Why Mid-Market Operators Stand Up Internal AI Sandboxes Before Production Agent Rollout
proposal.one_line_angle: Most mid-market teams skip the lab step and push GPT straight into production, then scramble when agents misfire under live load. This post lays out the 4-component AI Lab (sandbox env, eval set, governance rubric, decision log) operators are building so production rollout stops being a coin flip.
outline_bullets: Why Skipping the Lab Step Breaks Mid-Market AI Rollouts
The 4-Component AI Lab: Sandbox, Eval Set, Governance Rubric, Decision Log
Inside a 90-Day AI Lab Sprint: What to Build, Test, and Promote to Production
